mnemonics.title: FROZEN Layers
mnemonics.content: Freeze Really Old Zones Early - First layers contain basic features

mnemonics.title: Transfer Steps
mnemonics.content: TASK: Take pretrained model, Add new layers, Select layers to freeze, Keep training

visualTips.visualization: Imagine pre-trained model as feature factory pipeline
Picture two overlapping but offset distributions

analogies.analogy: Like using cooking skills from Italian to learn French cuisine
Preserving foundation of a house while renovating top floors
